title: aeollanthus subacaulis var. subacaulis
intro: Aeollanthus subacaulis var. subacaulis is a plant species within the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the mint or dead nettle family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Aeollanthus subacaulis var. subacaulis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
